prompt: Create a whimsical storybook-style watercolor illustration of a young female alchemist named Luna working at a wooden desk under a night sky motif. The character has long flowing black hair with purple ombré ends, wears an ornate black, white, and violet fantasy alchemist outfit with gold trim, a purple ribbon brooch at the collar, layered cape, belts, pouches, and star decorations; her face is intentionally obscured by a soft vertical gray blur rectangle with no visible facial features. She holds one purple liquid test tube in her left hand and steadies a golden armillary sphere with her right hand. The desk contains exactly 14 visible alchemy and study objects: 1 golden armillary sphere with star patterns, 1 open botanical book, 1 closed blue book underneath, 1 purple potion flask on the desk, 1 wooden test tube rack, 5 test tubes in the rack containing clear, purple, blue, yellow, and pale liquid, 1 small glass vessel near the rack, 1 lavender triangular cloth runner with gold stars and tassels, 1 small star charm, and 1 wooden tabletop. On the left shelf area show exactly 7 glass laboratory containers: 3 tall stoppered bottles, 1 round flask with pink liquid, 1 small bottle with purple liquid, 1 lidded jar, and 1 narrow vial. In the lower left foreground show exactly 1 cream ceramic pitcher filled with wildflowers, including lavender sprigs, purple pansies, peach flowers, white blossoms, green leaves, and trailing vines. In the background show exactly 1 crescent moon, 8 small golden stars, and 1 soft cluster of pale lavender clouds. Use delicate ink outlines, airy white background, transparent watercolor washes, pastel purple and gold accents, hand-drawn children’s book fantasy texture, light paper grain, and a cozy magical laboratory mood. The overall palette should emphasize lavender purple, warm gold, cream, and muted brown wood. Vertical composition, centered character and desk, no hard shadows, no photorealism, no extra text, no watermark.
